project_type: Rust async daemon (tokio) that bridges AI agent backends to chat platforms
test_framework: cargo test with integration tests in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: Run cargo check after edits, cargo test before claiming done
setup_instructions: cargo check to verify baseline compiles
environment_constraints: No new dependencies allowed in Cargo.toml. Use tokio::process::Command for all tmux subprocess calls. No unsafe. All I/O must be async.
contribution_requirements: Follow CLAUDE.md: async I/O only (tokio), anyhow::Result at boundaries, tracing for logging, no unsafe, no new deps, cargo check after edits
key_patterns: AgentSession trait in src/agent/mod.rs defines the contract. ACP session in src/agent/acp/session.rs is the reference pattern. Registry in src/agent/registry.rs dispatches by backend string. Config structs in src/config/mod.rs with serde Deserialize. Events flow through mpsc channel as AgentEvent enum.
directory_structure: src/agent/ contains agent backends (acp/, mod.rs with ClaudeSession, registry.rs). src/config/ has all config structs. src/core/ has event.rs (AgentEvent enum), session.rs, platform.rs. src/engine/ routes messages. src/platforms/ has telegram/discord adapters.
